name: Hoyle Waterproof Playing Cards, Clear Plastic Deck of Cards for Outdoor Card Games, Camping, Beach, Pool & Travel Games (1 Deck) | playing-cards
bullets: WATERPROOF PLAYING CARDS: Keep the fun going anywhere with Hoyle Waterproof Playing Cards, the clear waterproof cards made for indoor and outdoor play. This waterproof deck of cards stands up to spills, splashes, and pool games with ease.

DURABLE PLASTIC CARDS: Built from premium, flexible plastic, these waterproof plastic cards resist bending, tearing, and sticking. A reliable waterproof cards deck that’s tough enough for every shuffle and deal.

SMOOTH SHUFFLING & PLAY: Designed for effortless handling, this Hoyle Waterproof Playing Cards deck shuffles smoothly and stays easy to read, even when wet. Perfect for poker night or casual card games alike.

LONG-LASTING & WASHABLE: Unlike paper decks, this waterproof deck of cards is made to last. Simply rinse or wipe clean after use, and your Hoyle playing cards are ready for the next round of family card games.
PERFECT FOR PLAY ANYWHERE: Take your card games on the go! From camping trips and tailgates to beach days and pool games, these waterproof card games are ready wherever fun happens.
description: Turn every game night into an adventure with Hoyle Waterproof Playing Cards, the clear waterproof deck of cards designed for fun anywhere. Say goodbye to the soggy paper deck of cards! This plastic playing card deck is crafted from premium, flexible plastic that stays smooth, durable, and easy to shuffle, even when wet. Built for longevity, this waterproof cards deck resists bending, tearing, and sticking, making it perfect for everything from poker night to pool games. Each waterproof plastic card can be rinsed or wiped clean, keeping your deck fresh and ready for the next round. Whether you’

reviews.name: mrtn wntr
reviews.title: High-quality deck that’s perfect for camping, boating, poolside games, or just everyday use
reviews.body: These Hoyle Waterproof Playing Cards are fantastic! I’ve used them outdoors and around the pool, and they hold up perfectly. The waterproof design means no worries about spills, splashes, or humidity — they stay in great condition no matter the environment.The cards shuffle easily, feel durable in hand, and don’t warp or tear like regular paper cards. The print is clear and easy to read, and…

reviews.name: Elliott J.
reviews.title: Great!
reviews.body: Cards were great and waterproof. Perfect for playing on the pool deck

reviews.name: ohiobuckeye15
reviews.title: Quality, budget friendly and always a big hit as a gift
reviews.body: I've had multiple of these and I've given away a couple as gifts. People absolutely love them and you can't go wrong with such a cool budget friendly gift!They are totally waterproof and as expected from a Hoyle deck they are easy to shuffle and work perfectly right out of the box.They are the exact size everyone expects from Hoyle, the design is nice looking but not at all relevant to my uses,…

reviews.name: Aioxmaeday
reviews.title: slippery
reviews.body: They are very slippery but overall it is a whole deck and they are water proof so good product
